name: I talked to insurance about my lawyer's AI screw-up in Phoenix—did I mess up my claim?
description: Maybe; lawyer up before more insurer talks.[2]

mainEntity.name: I talked to insurance about my lawyer's AI screw-up in Phoenix—did I mess up my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; lawyer up before more insurer talks.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, as insurer statements can be used against you; request policy details and avoid admitting fault. AI malpractice claims proceed like standard negligence, but verify coverage first.[2] Factors: policy exclusions for intentional acts. Get lawyer to handle adjuster talks. Preserve claim rights by not signing releases hastily.
